prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招（+6.8%）但远不 及考生增幅（+8.4%）、声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年竞争进一步加剧，位次继续后移；在2025年基准26844名基础上，预测最低位次约28142名，区间27642–28642名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 16226 → 17815 → 18020 → 21009 → 26844, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 10618 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 26844, a significant backward shift of 5835 places compared to 2024, indicating intensified competition; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 37 in 2021, 41 in 2022, 42 in 2023, 43 in 2024, and 44 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion; the 2026 plan is 47, an increase of 3 (+6.8%) from 2025, with limited expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, the only 211 among traditional Chinese medicine institutions; ranked 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (61st in 2025), with a stable ranking around 60. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to a decline of over 500 places in admission rankings in provinces like Hebei and Henan in 2025, and a gap in some provinces for the Chinese Medicine major, which may suppress application psychology; Douyin popularity is average (103rd overall), with low short video exposure; Chinese Medicine, Integrated Chinese and Western Medicine, and related majors have strong appeal for applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to be highly popular, with Chinese Medicine as a distinctive major attracting considerable attention; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,192 in 2025, with a significant expansion in the examinee pool and increased competition pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the small expansion in the 2026 plan (+6.8%) far below the examinee growth rate (+8.4%), and the somewhat negative reputation, competition is expected to further intensify in 2026, with rankings continuing to shift backward; based on the 2025 baseline of 26844, the predicted minimum ranking is about 28142, with a range of 27642–28642.

- Chinese Medicine (Excellent 5+3 Integrated Program).

- Pharmacy.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- English (International Communication of Chinese Medicine).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 27642–28642, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 27000), you can focus on reaching for top majors like the Chinese Medicine Excellent Class; for rankings near the upper limit (e.g., above 28500), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2157 → 2762 → 3184 → 3781 → 2860, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, reaching the highest point of 3781 in 2024 before rebounding to 2860 in 2025 (moving forward by 921 places), with a cumulative backward shift of about 703 places over the past 5 years. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 9 in 2021, 5 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 4 in 2024, and 5 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 6, an increase of 1 (+20%) compared to 2025, with a relatively large expansion rate but an absolute increase of only 1 person.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, the only 211 among traditional Chinese medicine institutions. Ranked 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable performance. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to the decline in admission rankings in some provinces in 2025, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. Douyin popularity is average, with low short video exposure. Core advantageous disciplines such as Chinese Medicine and Integrated Chinese and Western Medicine (data from the fifth round of discipline evaluation is missing) are attractive to History Category candidates applying for Chinese medicine-related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Hunan Province is approximately 187,000, a significant increase of about 31.2% compared to 142,547 in 2025, with a substantial expansion in candidate scale and a sharp rise in competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound in 2025 rankings, but the 31.2% surge in History Category candidates in 2026, the expansion of only 1 person (+20%) which is far from sufficient to absorb the increase in candidates, and the somewhat negative reputation, it is expected that competition will significantly intensify in 2026, with rankings moving backward again. Based on the 2025 baseline of 2860, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3283, with a range of 2783–3783.
